title: ozarthris triquetra
intro: Ozarthris triquetra, also known as the Three-angled Burdock, is a perennial plant species in the Asteraceae family. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Ozarthris triquetra include the relief of digestive issues, reduction of fever, and treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its ability to aid in the removal of parasites. Herbal preparations of Ozarthris triquetra include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or used topically to promote overall well-being.
